cases.name: ChatGPT reference-conditioned generation
expected: route is selected only after usable conversation references are confirmed
actual tool and model are recorded
final image is visible in the user-facing response

cases.name: ChatGPT exact image edit
expected: the editable source is present in the current conversation
approved locks are preserved
selected mode remains edit

cases.name: Nano Banana-style multi-reference synthesis
expected: reference roles are mapped explicitly
external generation success is not treated as delivery
delivery is verified by the orchestration layer

cases.name: Missing mask edit stops local correction
expected: unknown mask-edit is treated as unsupported
full-scene regeneration is not selected silently
the run stops or requests explicit degradation approval

cases.name: Missing multi-reference uses disclosed staged route
expected: staging is allowed only for non-overlapping reference roles
increased drift risk is recorded
identity or composition loss causes a stop

cases.name: Missing upscale preserves native asset
expected: native validated output is retained
interpolation is not mislabeled as generative upscale
mandatory higher resolution causes a stop or approved external route

cases.name: Delivery capability regression
expected: tool success does not complete the task
DELIVERY_MISSING is emitted
output manifest remains invalid until the image is visible

cases.name: Hidden route degradation rejected
expected: requested and selected mode mismatch requires a fallback record
transformation mode changes require user approval
unknown capabilities cannot be asserted as supported
